amendments.normalized_body: In the snapshot write error recovery path (engine.rs ~line 4657-4683), if `fail_run`'s own snapshot write at line 5133 also fails (e.g. persistent disk I/O error), the `?` propagates the error without emitting a `run_failed` journal event and without any snapshot reaching disk — potentially leaving the project in an inconsistent state where the journal has a `stage_failed` event but the on-disk snapshot is stale. Consider wrapping `fail_run`'s snapshot write in a best-effort fallback (e.g. log the double-failure and still emit the journal event), or at minimum add a comment documenting this known limitation and why it's acceptable.

final_accepted_amendments.normalized_body: In the snapshot write error recovery path (engine.rs ~line 4657-4683), if `fail_run`'s own snapshot write at line 5133 also fails (e.g. persistent disk I/O error), the `?` propagates the error without emitting a `run_failed` journal event and without any snapshot reaching disk — potentially leaving the project in an inconsistent state where the journal has a `stage_failed` event but the on-disk snapshot is stale. Consider wrapping `fail_run`'s snapshot write in a best-effort fallback (e.g. log the double-failure and still emit the journal event), or at minimum add a comment documenting this known limitation and why it's acceptable.

payload.summary: Final review accepted 1 amendment(s); restart required.
